title: Create: Gears of Creation
description:
Unleash your creativity with Create: Gears of Creation!

has a lot of create mods that will never limit your creativity. 
 this modpack also includes beautiful landscapes, dimensions,and many optimization mods so you can be fully immersed.
body:
Create: Gears of Creation is a Modpack based off the Create Mod that adds 

- A lot of Create mods
- Many Dimensions 
- Many optimization mods
- Over 100 new biomes with many variants
- Many new mobs and new mob variants
- Guns...a lotta guns...
- Space Mods! 
- Revamped Caves, End and Nether
- Magic Mods!
  
And many many more!

                                 !!IMPORTANT!!
               PLEASE ALLOCATE IT 9 OR 11 GIGS FOR IT TO WORK PROPERLY!!!

This is my first ever modpack and i hope you guys like it! 


i have playtested this modpack quite a bit and i know its stable 
but if you ever encounter any bugs or glitches contact or mention me at
@SakuraKai9983/Create: Gears of Creation On Twitter/X

also here's a link to create mod wiki in case you need it

[https://create.fandom.com/wiki/Create_Mod_Wiki](https://create.fandom.com/wiki/Create_Mod_Wiki)
